items.name_en: This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Burgundy calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Burgundy calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
Main: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beading on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beading and leather straps
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style No.: S3123

items.name_en: This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo,
Zipper closure,
Adjustable top handle with CD buckles,
2 metal rings to connect the series' embroidered shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap.
Number: S5554,
Dimensions: 22 x 13 x 9.5 cm

items.name_en: This Lady D-Joy mini handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Lady D-Joy mini handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
D.I.O.R. Charms
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 16 x 9 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Style No.: S0910

items.name_en: This Miss Caro Top Handle Clutch is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, a daily item that showcases exquisite charm. Crafted from lambskin, it features a large woven trim and a vintage gold-finish metal CD turn-lock clasp on the flap, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. It comes with a compartment to store various daily essentials. The foldable top handle allows for hand carrying, elevating the sophisticated look.
items.name_cn:
This Miss Caro Top Handle Clutch is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, a daily item that showcases exquisite charm. Crafted from lambskin, it features a large woven trim and a vintage gold-finish metal CD turn-lock clasp on the flap, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. It comes with a compartment to store various daily essentials. The foldable top handle allows for hand carrying, elevating the sophisticated look.
Lining: Lambskin, fabric CD turn-lock clasp flap closure
1 internal compartment, 1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Dimensions: 24x12x4cm (LxHxW)
Style No.: 5221

items.name_en: This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
items.name_cn:
This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
A spacious compartment with a snap and buckle closure safely holds daily essentials, while a card slot adds a refined touch. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy carrying by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
Model 9961

items.name_en: This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
items.name_cn:
This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
Model: 698567
Size: 24x18x5.5cm

items.name_en: Three colors, two sizes available🌟🌟🌟🌟 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C latest woven flap bag, handmade woven bag, woven shopping bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements that are indispensable in vacation vibes, using imported natural wheat straw grass. Just didn't expect so many bright suede material handbags to appear in the summer vacation series... Matching for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, jewelry embellishments are a must on the handbag, the collector's series ice cream cup is the favorite~ Dimensions: 26cm, 23cm
